name: Emily Achtenhagen
ai_summary: Emily Achtenhagen is a former Colorado resident now in Salt Lake City, UT with substitute teaching experience in preschools and a Recreation degree. She handles conflicts through child-led communication and brings energetic enthusiasm to working with children.

transcripts.q3:
Hi there. My name is Emily. I am from Colorado and moved to Salt Lake for school. For years ago, I am currently substitute teaching for Park City School District. And recently, I spent a bunch of days in one of their preschools up there and I realized I really enjoy working with the younger kids. One of my friends told me about up kid and how you guys are specifically for younger kids.
 And daycares and preschools and that kind of stuff. So, that got me interested in up kid. And as far as my experience, working with kids, the substitute teaching, and then I'm getting a degree in Recreation. So, I've worked with kids in a variety of outdoor recreation settings, like, ski programs and that kind of thing, and then grew up babysitting. And yeah, that's a little bit about me. But I just think working with kids are fun, the energy and the excitement that
 they bring and I would love to work with you guys. Thanks so much.
transcripts.q4: Hi there. I am in Salt Lake City, Utah in like the downtown area and I'm willing to travel up to 30 minutes for shifts.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for around 30 hours a week and I am totally free Monday through Friday each week.
transcripts.q6:
I think with this example of one kid hitting another kid, the most important part is communication between the two of them. So getting them both to sit down in a quiet place, they're facing each other and communicating to each other and not towards me if I'm mediating the conversation and make sure they both understand what happened and why it happened and sincere, apologies and make sure that everyone agrees upon the resolution. Whether
 That's if something needs to change. Or if it's just an apology and then making sure that at the end of the conversation, that it's everyone's clear on the resolution and that communicated was that it was communicated to each person properly and everyone understands
transcripts.q7:
I would make a great up kid teacher because I love working with kids with how much energy and enthusiasm they have for life. And I like to think that I present some of the same similar characteristics in ways. Like I like to think I'm a very energetic and fun person and I can relate to them and have fun with them in that way. And at the same time, I can also be the one that can take
 charge and be in charge of a situation when needed.
